Nagpur Railway Station, oldest railway stations India, eyeing Green certification station.
preparing certified Green Railway Station, division decided hire consultant suggest modalities carrying necessary changes building's interior exterior.
consultant will study entire building identify area where station lacks suggest measures same.
Railway Station's efficiency controlling pollution, renewable energy, water harvesting etc., deciding factors getting Green certification.
ratings decided Platinum, Gold Silver category.
After Secunderabad railway station Telangana certified first green railway station India 2017, several other stations have shown keen interest becoming Green stations.
There nearly railway stations which proposed redeveloped which will also retrofitted with Green features.
Green stations mainly produce efficiency energy water consumption handling solid waste.
case Nagpur station, ventilation system likely improved that natural breeze could move freely.
Also, roof solar system liekly installed generate power used station.
Another area looked upon water harvesting system.
2008, Nagpur Junction Railway Station among stations India that were recommended upgraded meet international standards.
Priority areas identified then were: security, safety cleanliness.
Work undertaken Public-Private Partnerships Central Railway.
However, nothing much happened that front since then.

Modesto Police Detectives investigating series violent robberies involving suspects.
Wednesday November 16th police received report armed robbery that occurred Metro store 2019 Tully
injured during robbery suspects fled with undisclosed amount money.
suspects were described Hispanic males early 20's 5-8.
They were seen leaving maroon four door sedan.
Saturday November 19th second robbery reported 2900 Standiford Metro store where similar suspect entered store again took undisclosed amount money.
Tuesday November 22nd, Modesto Police received reports robberies within couple hours another.
first Coffee (A.J.
Market) around 5:55
this incident Hispanic males possibly teenagers entered store demanded money.
suspect fired unknown caliber handgun into ceiling.
Fortunately during shooting.
second robbery occurred 7:37 2100 Standiford (Little Caesars Pizza).
both crimes suspects were described teenagers acne.
Investigations revealed that suspect used name "Andrew" while speaking second suspect time robbery.
Modesto Police Department asking public help attempting locate these dangerous suspects.
Investigators believe robberies connected.
suspects described Hispanic males early 20's possibly teenagers named Andrew driving maroon four-door sedan.
suspect stole vehicle Ceres leads Modesto Police pursuit West Modesto, eventually leading down Club golf course, then river bottom property Tuolumne River.
suspect, with Police trail, lost control vehicle rolled into water.
